title: Notice of direction: Excellence, Achievement & Learning Limited (EAL)
body: "On 17 March 2025, Ofqual gave a direction to Excellence, Achievement & Learning Limited (EAL) in relation to incorrect results issued by EAL for an end-point assessment (‘EPA’) qualification. The direction required EAL to identify all Adverse Effects, in connection with the incorrect results issued, to consider whether it would be appropriate to correct those results and to report its findings to Ofqual.   Ofqual has published information about the direction in this summary form in order to protect the privacy of affected learners. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
